prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约156名，2023年理科约122名，2025年物理类最低位次约1162名（含临床医学八年制267名、口腔医学994名、临床医学卓越班1162名）。202 2—2023年仅招临床医学八年制1个专业，位次极高；2025年扩招至3个专业后位次大幅后移至1162名，反映出招生规模扩大对位次的显著影响；2022—2023年理科 计划均为2人，2025年物理类计划增至11人；2026年物理类计划大幅扩至23人，较2025年增加12人（增幅约109%），扩招幅度极大，将显著拉低位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年复旦大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校本部师德师风及管理事件，对医学院报考影响有限；抖音热度总排名第4（高热），关注度极高；未见明显 投档断档记录；临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A、基础医学A-、口腔医学A-（均为复旦大学评估结果，归属上海医学院），学科实力位居 全国前列；985、211、双一流；复旦大学软科主榜2026年约第5名，复旦大学上海医学院为国内顶尖医学院校，临床医学、基础医学等学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力持续强 劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学持续高热推荐，医学类专业报考热度居高不下；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约46. 3万）明显增加，按历史比例估算物理类考生约32.9万（较2025年28.5万增加约15.5%），竞争加剧；复旦大学上海医学院 位于上海，对四川考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川招生占比近年有所提升，2025年物理类计划11人，2026年扩至23人，显示对四川生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次1162名、2026年大幅扩招109%（位次后移主因）、四川省考生增加约15.5%（竞争加剧，位次前移）、医学专业持续高热（位次前移）等因素，扩招影响远大于考生增加 和热度影响，预计2026年最低位次较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约1893名，区间1677—2109名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 156; in 2023, it was about 122 for science; in 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was about 1162 (including Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program 267, Stomatology 994, Clinical Medicine Excellence Class 1162). From 2022 to 2023, only the Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program was offered, with extremely high rankings; in 2025, after expanding to 3 majors, the ranking significantly dropped to 1162, reflecting the notable impact of enrollment expansion on rankings; from 2022 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 2 people each year; in 2025, the Physics Category plan increased to 11 people; in 2026, the Physics Category plan greatly expanded to 23 people, an increase of 12 people (approximately 109%) compared to 2025, a substantial expansion that will significantly lower the ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, Fudan University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the main campus's teacher ethics and management incidents, with limited impact on medical college applications; Douyin popularity ranks 4th overall (high heat), with extremely high attention; no obvious records of admission cut-off drops; Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, Basic Medicine A-, Stomatology A- (all are Fudan University evaluation results, belonging to Shanghai Medical College), with disciplinary strength ranking among the top in the country; 985, 211, Double First-Class; Fudan University's Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 5th, and Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is a top domestic medical school, with extremely strong disciplinary strength in Clinical Medicine, Basic Medicine, etc., maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, with medical majors remaining extremely popular; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, a significant increase from 2025 (Physics Category + History Category approximately 463,000); estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category examinees are about 329,000 (an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025), intensifying competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees; the proportion of enrollment in Sichuan has increased in recent years, with the Physics Category plan being 11 in 2025 and expanding to 23 in 2026, showing emphasis on Sichuan student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1162, the significant enrollment expansion of 109% in 2026 (main reason for ranking decline), the increase of about 15.5% in Sichuan examinees (intensified competition, ranking improvement), and the sustained high popularity of medical majors (ranking improvement), the impact of enrollment expansion far outweighs the increase in examinees and popularity. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1893, with a range of 1677 to 2109.

- Nursing (including Nursing Excellence Class, Nursing-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (1677-2109), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1600), focus on reaching for the Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 2100), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Fudan University ranks approximately 5th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is a top domestic medical school, nursing discipline rated A-, very high level; in 2026, Fudan University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly related to incidents at the main campus, which has limited impact on applications to the medical college's nursing major; Douyin heat ranking 4th overall (high heat), extremely high attention; nursing A- (Fudan University evaluation result), is the only advantageous discipline corresponding to the liberal arts group's enrollment major, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of the nursing major was rated as recommended (slightly hot), with talent shortage and high employment rate, application heat rising; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, estimated history category examinees about 206,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 178,000 in 2025), competition intensifying; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees; the nursing major has been continuously enrolling in Sichuan's history category, with a plan of 4 in 2025 and unchanged in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2397, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, about 15.7% increase in Sichuan history category examinees (competition intensifies, ranking moves forward), and the nursing major's popularity being slightly hot (ranking moves forward), the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 2357, range 2088-2626.
